2.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)\n/ OR / \n2.2 REJECT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse) note over C1,S1 #f0f8ff# "Delete Folder"\nThe client requests to delete a folder.\nIf successful, server returns success response;\notherwise failure reason returned in error field of DeleteFolderResponse message body. end note group Request Deletion Process [optional] alt Successful deletion request received by Server from Client side via network connection established between them using TCP/IP protocol stack implementation details hidden behind abstraction layers provided at application level where user interacts directly through GUI or CLI interfaces depending upon system configuration settings chosen during installation process setup phase before actual usage begins... etcetera ad
